eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 06:08 AM ON MAR 26, 2026 Effective until 06:08 AM MAR 27, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
ELEVATED FIRE CONDITIONS. Due to continued dry conditions, low humidity and shifting high winds.
Thursday 3/26 continual through Sunday 3/29. 
Outdoor burning is NOT recommended.
